hotels.description_en:

hotels.name: Navy Condo for 6, free parking
hotels.description_fr:
LГўвӮ¬в„ўhГғВ©bergement Navy Condo for 6, free parking se trouve ГғВ  Turku, ГғВ  respectivement 6,4 km et 6,7 km de ces lieux dГўвӮ¬в„ўintГғВ©rГғВӘt : ChГғВўteau de Turku et Terminal Tallink Silja. Il propose une terrasse et la climatisation. Cet hГғВ©bergement est installГғВ© ГғВ  6,4 km deГӮВ : Port Arthur. Il propose un jardin et un parking privГғВ© gratuit.

Cet appartement compte 2 chambres, une cuisine avec un rГғВ©frigГғВ©rateur et un micro-ondes, une tГғВ©lГғВ©vision ГғВ  ГғВ©cran plat, un coin salon, ainsi que 1 salle de bains comportant un bidet.

Vous sГғВ©journerez ГғВ  respectivement 6,7 km et 6,9 km de ces lieux dГўвӮ¬в„ўintГғВ©rГғВӘt : Terminus de la ligne Viking et St Michael's Church. L'aГғВ©roport le plus proche (AГғВ©roport de Turku) est ГғВ  11 km.

hotels.description_en:
Comfortable Accommodation: Navy Condo for 6, free parking in Turku offers a two-bedroom apartment with a living room. The property features family rooms, air-conditioning, and a terrace with garden views.
Modern Amenities: Guests enjoy a fully equipped kitchen, washing machine, fireplace, and free toiletries. Additional amenities include a dining area, sofa bed, and parquet floors.
Convenient Location: Located 6 km from Port Arthur and Turku Castle, the apartment is 7 km from Tallink Silja and Viking Line Terminals. Turku Central Station is 7 km away, and Turku Airport is 11 km distant.

hotels.description_es:
Navy Condo for 6, free parking se encuentra en Turku, a 6,4 km de Port Arthur, y ofrece alojamiento con aire acondicionado y parking privado ofrece en el propio alojamiento. El alojamiento ofrece vistas al jardГғВӯn y estГғВЎ a 6,4 km de Castillo de Turku y a 6,7 km de Terminal de Tallink Silja.

Este apartamento cuenta con 2 dormitorios, cocina con nevera y microondas, TV de pantalla plana, zona de estar y 1 baГғВұo con bidet.

El apartamento dispone de terraza, ademГғВЎs de jardГғВӯn.

Viking Line Terminal estГғВЎ a 6,7 km del alojamiento, y St Michael's Church estГғВЎ a 6,9 km. El aeropuerto (Aeropuerto de Turku) estГғВЎ a 11 km.

hotels.name: FГғВ¶ri condo, sauna and parking
hotels.description_fr:
DotГғВ© dГўвӮ¬в„ўun sauna, lГўвӮ¬в„ўhГғВ©bergement FГғВ¶ri condo, sauna and parking vous accueille ГғВ  Turku, ГғВ  1,6 km de ce lieu dГўвӮ¬в„ўintГғВ©rГғВӘt : St Michael's Church. Cet hГғВ©bergement est installГғВ© ГғВ  1,3 km deГӮВ : Paavo Nurmi Stadium. Il comprend une terrasse et un parking privГғВ© gratuit.
Disposant dГўвӮ¬в„ўun balcon et offrant une vue sur le cours dГўвӮ¬в„ўeau, cet appartement possГғВЁde 1 chambre, un salon, une tГғВ©lГғВ©vision ГғВ  ГғВ©cran plat, une cuisine ГғВ©quipГғВ©e avec un lave-vaisselle et un micro-ondes, ainsi que 1 salle de bains avec une baignoire ou une douche. Des serviettes et du linge de lit sont ГғВ  votre disposition.
Vous sГғВ©journerez ГғВ  respectivement 2,3 km et 2,4 km de ces lieux dГўвӮ¬в„ўintГғВ©rГғВӘt : Port Arthur et Gare de Turku. L'aГғВ©roport le plus proche (AГғВ©roport de Turku) est ГғВ  11 km.
hotels.description_en:
Comfortable Living Space: FГғВ¶ri condo, sauna and parking in Turku offers a one-bedroom apartment with a living room. The property features a balcony with river views, a fully equipped kitchen, and a washing machine.
Relaxing Facilities: Guests can enjoy a sauna, terrace, and free WiFi. Additional amenities include a lift, family rooms, and free on-site private parking.
Prime Location: Located 11 km from Turku Airport, the apartment is a short walk from Paavo Nurmi Stadium (16 minutes) and St Michael's Church (1.6 km). Nearby attractions include Port Arthur and Turku Cathedral.
Highly Rated by Guests: FГғВ¶ri condo, sauna and parking receives high ratings for its comfortable accommodations and excellent facilities.
Couples particularly like the location ГўвӮ¬вҖқ they rated it 9.
hotels.description_es:
FГғВ¶ri condo, sauna and parking se encuentra a 18 min a pie de St Michael's Church y ofrece alojamiento en Turku con acceso a una sauna. El alojamiento, que estГғВЎ a 16 min a pie de Paavo Nurmi Stadium, dispone de terraza y parking privado gratis.
El apartamento cuenta con balcГғВіn y vistas al rГғВӯo, y tiene 1 dormitorio, una sala de estar, TV de pantalla plana, una cocina equipada con lavavajillas y microondas, y 1 baГғВұo con baГғВұera o ducha. Hay toallas y ropa de cama en el apartamento.
Port Arthur estГғВЎ a 2,3 km del alojamiento, y EstaciГғВіn de tren de Turku estГғВЎ a 2,4 km. El aeropuerto (Aeropuerto de Turku) estГғВЎ a 11 km.
A las parejas les encanta la ubicaciГғВіn ГўвӮ¬вҖқ Le han puesto un 9,7 para viajes de dos personas.
Las distancias en la descripciГғВіn del alojamiento se calculan con OpenStreetMapГӮВ©
hotels.description_pt:
A 18 minutos a pГғВ© de St Michael's Church, FГғВ¶ri condo, sauna and parking dispГғВөe de acomodaГғВ§ГғВөes com sauna em Turku. Situado a 16 minutos a pГғВ© de Paavo Nurmi Stadium, o alojamento apresenta um terraГғВ§o e estacionamento privado gratuito.
Este apartamento com uma varanda e vista do rio tem 1 quarto, uma sala de estar, uma televisГғВЈo de ecrГғВЈ plano, uma cozinha equipada com mГғВЎquina de lavar louГғВ§a e micro-ondas, e 1 casa de banho com banheira ou chuveiro. Toalhas e roupa de cama sГғВЈo providenciadas neste apartamento.
Port Arthur fica a 2,3 km de FГғВ¶ri condo, sauna and parking, enquanto Turku Central Station fica a 2,4 km da propriedade. O Aeroporto de Turku fica a 11 km de distГғВўncia.
Os casais gostam particularmente da localizaГғВ§ГғВЈo ГўвӮ¬вҖң deram uma pontuaГғВ§ГғВЈo de 9,7 para uma viagem a dois.
hotels.description_it:
A 1,6 km da St Michael's Church, FГғВ¶ri condo, sauna and parking mette a disposizione un alloggio a Turku con sauna. Situata a 1,3 km da Paavo Nurmi Stadium, la struttura propone una terrazza e il parcheggio privato gratuito.
Questo appartamento con balcone e vista sul fiume offre 1 camera da letto, un soggiorno, una TV a schermo piatto, una cucina con lavastoviglie e microonde e 1 bagno con vasca o doccia. Presso questo appartamento troverete asciugamani e lenzuola tra i servizi disponibili.
Port Arthur ГғВЁ a 2,3 km da questo appartamento, mentre Turku Central Station si trova a 2,4 km dalla struttura. Aeroporto di Turku si trova a 11 km di distanza.
Le coppie apprezzano molto la posizione: l'hanno valutata 9,7 per un viaggio a due.
